name: Tested Freedreno Turnip Mesa Vulkan drivers on Dolphin
snippet:
Freedreno is the open-source, reverse-engineered project implementing a fully open-source driver for Qualcomm's Adreno graphics hardware.
Performance is almost 1:1 , Qualcomm drivers jump up to 48-50fps but have massive drops after that to 40-42fps. Turnip has stable 43-45fps in 3K ...
